advisoryTemplates.title: Planetary Dasha Conflict
advisoryTemplates.content: Current major planetary period (Mahadasha/Antardasha) poses challenges for deep detoxification. Recommended to wait until next favorable transit.

advisoryTemplates.title: Low Pranic Vitality
advisoryTemplates.content: The chart indicates depleted vital force (Prana Ojas) at this time. Aggressive Shodhana (detoxification) is contraindicated. Gentle Brihmana (nourishing) therapy is advised first.

advisoryTemplates.title: Unfavorable Seasonal Transit
advisoryTemplates.content: The requested timeframe coincides with unfavorable seasonal transitions for the individual's constitution. Deferment to the recommended optimal window is necessary to prevent aggravation.

preparatoryPlanTemplates.title: Agni Deepana & Ama Pachana
preparatoryPlanTemplates.content: Focus on kindling digestive fire and digesting metabolic waste. Follow a light, warm, cooked diet (Kitchari protocol). Drink warm water with cumin, coriander, and fennel. Avoid all dairy, cold foods, and raw salads for 4 weeks.

preparatoryPlanTemplates.title: Pre-Detox Rasayana
preparatoryPlanTemplates.content: Build strength prior to treatment. Take Ashwagandha and Shatavari with warm milk. Ensure 8 hours of sleep. Daily gentle yoga and Pranayama. Resume contact in 3 months for re-evaluation.
